creator: kiwi@oav.net
text:
About USE_GITHUB and Jackett.
Unfortunatly I cannot use this since this "mono" compiled stuff. So I cannot use the sources and compile that.
I use the same kind of port as net-p2p/radarr or net-p2p/sonarr

Portlint is ok "looks fine" :
[root@portsbuild /usr/ports/net-p2p/jackett]# portlint
looks fine.

Unfortunatly I don't have poudriere at home mostly because I don't enough ressources to handle it at my home.

About feld@, it is there because I copied a rc script from radarr that is signed by feld@.

Regards
